title: coleus cylindraceus
intro: Coleus cylindraceus, also known as Blue Pita or Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia, often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which may help alleviate various health issues such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Traditionally, the leaves of Coleus cylindraceus are used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may also be used to treat digestive issues and boost the immune system.
